SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Password Input Box and Button Opacity in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Set the opacity of the password input box and buttons when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Hide All UI by Default in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Hide the clock, login button, and other UI elements by default when entering lock screen mode. You can click on a blank area to show them

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Toggle UI Display with Mouse Click in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: When in lock screen mode, clicking on a blank area toggles the visibility of UI elements

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: 12-Hour Time Format
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Uncheck this option to use 24-hour time format

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Password Input Box Hint Text
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: The hint text displayed in the password input box

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Password Input Box Width
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Set the width of the custom login password input box

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Password Input Box Height
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Set the height of the custom login password input box (Note: this also affects the height of the login button)

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Login Button Icon
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Select an icon file for the custom login button. If empty, the default icon will be used
SettingItems.Title: Please select a file

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Login Button Icon (Hover State)
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Select an icon file for the custom login button in hover state. If empty, the default icon will be used

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Spacing Between Clock and Input Box
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Set the spacing between the clock and the password input box
